thought
*   Linguistic: No text, but agrees with others on Taiwan.
    *   Landscape: High confidence in Taiwan (narrow alleys, tiled facades, scooters, security grilles).
    *   Botanics: Subtropical (consistent with Taiwan and Southern China).
    *   Regulatory: High confidence in Taiwan (right-hand traffic, utility poles, scooter density). Rules out Japan (left-hand traffic).
    *   Meta: High confidence in Taiwan (security grilles, square tiles, scooter density, utility poles, AC mounts).

    *   Japan: Ruled out by Regulatory Agent (Right-hand traffic vs. Japan's left-hand traffic).
    *   Southern China: Possible botanically and regulatory-wise (right-hand traffic), but Landscape, Regulatory, and Meta agents all state that the specific combination of scooter density, utility pole design, and security grilles is more characteristic of Taiwan.

    *   All agents converged on Taiwan by Round 2.

        *   Right-hand traffic (eliminates Japan).
        *   High density of scooters (very characteristic of Taiwan).
        *   Specific metal security grilles on windows/doors (quintessential Taiwan).
        *   Small square exterior wall tiles (common in Taiwan).
        *   Utility pole wiring configuration (specific to Taiwan).
        *   Subtropical vegetation (consistent with Taiwan).
